_publications._publicationTitle: Biochemical and structural analyses reveal that the tumor suppressor neurofibromin (NF1) forms a high-affinity dimer.

_contextSnippet: using HEK293 cells lacking endogenous NF1, we were able to show that the CDEF and DEF domains of differentially epitope-tagged neurofibromin did co-IP
details: Used for transfection and co-immunoprecipitation studies of neurofibromin domain interactions
